Steady progress on Q2 goals. Partnership evaluation with Gamma Analytics advancing. Monitor AI rate-limit risk closely. Three workflow runs completed without issues.
Strong week overall. Revenue pipeline growing. One critical risk (key account renewals) requires immediate action. AI feature adoption accelerating.

opportunities.title: Gamma Analytics distribution partnership
opportunities.description: Co-sell agreement with Gamma Analytics to offer Acme as a native integration to their 12K enterprise users. Estimated 300–500 qualified leads in year one.

opportunities.title: Mid-market expansion via inside sales
opportunities.description: Companies with 50–200 employees are underserved by current self-serve motion. A 3-person inside sales team could add 40–60K MRR within 6 months.

opportunities.title: Annual plan upsell campaign
opportunities.description: Target the 340 monthly subscribers with >6 months tenure for an annual plan migration. Projected to lock in 1.4M ARR and reduce churn exposure.

evidence.note: 6mo+ users have 1.2% monthly churn vs 3.4% overall

opportunities.title: AI-powered onboarding automation
opportunities.description: Replace the 5-step manual onboarding checklist with an AI guide that adapts to user role and industry, projected to cut time-to-value from 14 days to 4.

evidence.note: 64% of churned users cited slow onboarding

opportunities.title: Beta Ventures fintech integration
opportunities.description: Beta Ventures needs a real-time transaction categorisation API. Building this as a paid add-on could serve the broader fintech vertical.

evidence.note: Feature request submitted by Beta Ventures CTO
